blocks.text: Confirmed: Alcaraz beat **Hanfmann** to reach R3 — so Hanfmann was his R2 opponent (validates the 2176 truth; my "Adam Walton" source was misattributed to the wrong round). Lesson: AO results ARE trackable but I must read which round carefully ("beat X to reach R3" = X was R2). Alcaraz's R4 opponent isn't in yet, so I'll keep my spread for 789844. Let me log and advance.
